Keywords: Unit testing business logic with mocked dependencies
Description: Add mocktail to dev_dependencies; create mock classes; use setUp for common setup
Code Example: Not using verify() to confirm interactions; not testing error cases

Description: Add bloc_test to dev_dependencies; use blocTest for declarative state testing
Code Example: Not testing error states; not verifying all emitted states in order

Description: Use WidgetTester; pump widgets with necessary providers; find by type/key/text
Code Example: Not pumping after state changes; not wrapping with MaterialApp; hardcoding strings

Keywords: Full app integration testing with real navigation
Description: Use integration_test package; test full user flows; use patrol for native interactions
Code Example: Not using pumpAndSettle for async operations; flaky tests due to timing

Description: Use golden_toolkit; generate golden files; compare on CI
Code Example: Not loading fonts for golden tests; platform-dependent golden files

Keywords: Testing with provider overrides and containers
Description: Create ProviderContainer with overrides; use ProviderScope.overrides in widget tests
Code Example: Not disposing containers; not overriding all necessary providers

Keywords: Mocking HTTP responses for API testing
Description: Use http_mock_adapter for Dio; load JSON fixtures from files
Code Example: Using real API calls in unit tests; not testing error responses

Keywords: Choosing between Fake Stub and Mock for test doubles
Description: Use Fake for full implementations; Mock for verification; Stub for simple returns
Code Example: Using Mock when Fake would give a more realistic test; over-mocking

Keywords: Creating reusable test data with factory methods
Description: Create factory methods or builders for test entities; keep in test/fixtures/
Code Example: Hardcoding test data inline in every test; copy-pasting entity creation

Description: Use flutter_test semantics tools; check for contrast; verify screen reader labels
Code Example: Not testing accessibility at all; missing semantic labels on interactive elements

Keywords: Testing rendering performance and frame rates
Description: Use flutter_driver or integration_test with tracing; benchmark critical flows
Code Example: Only testing correctness not performance; not setting performance budgets

Description: Run flutter test --coverage; set coverage thresholds in CI; exclude generated files
Setup:
# Run tests with coverage
flutter test --coverage

# Generate HTML report
genhtml coverage/lcov.info -o coverage/html
open coverage/html/index.html

# CI threshold check (in script)
COVERAGE=$(lcov --summary coverage/lcov.info 2>&1 | grep 'lines' | grep -oP '[0-9.]+%')
if [ $(echo \$COVERAGE < 80" | bc) -eq 1 ]; then
  echo 'Coverage below 80%!'
  exit 1
fi"
Code Example: No coverage measurement; testing only happy paths; 100% coverage with meaningless tests

Keywords: Organizing tests with proper structure and naming
Description: Group related tests; use descriptive names; setUp/tearDown for shared setup
Code Example: Flat test files with no grouping; test names like test1 test2

Description: Use Platform checks; skip tests on wrong platform; mock platform channels
Code Example: Not mocking platform channels; assuming platform behavior in all tests

Keywords: Running same test with multiple input/output combinations
Description: Use test() with forEach or a data table pattern
Package: Writing separate test functions for each input value
